title: No Céu da Pátria Nesse Instante
original_title: No Céu da Pátria Nesse Instante
overview: The documentary closely follows the turbulent months of the electoral period that culminated in the invasion of the National Congress, the Planalto Palace and the STF on January 8, 2023.
